# Suggested additions to the existing .gitignore
#
# The current .gitignore only excludes .pio/ and a few .vscode files. These build
# artifacts produced by the TTS packager aren't excluded yet and are easy to
# accidentally commit:

# TTS packager build output (regenerated by `pio run -e native`)
eccles/tools/bin/*.exe
eccles/tools/src/output/

# Generated model bundle + its index header (regenerated, not source)
data/StaticModel.eccles
include/StaticModel.h

# Build-cache hash used to skip re-packaging when models haven't changed
.models_hash

# Runtime log left behind in data/
data/log.txt

# --- How to use this file ---
# Append the lines above (everything that isn't a comment) to your existing
# .gitignore, then run:
#   git rm -r --cached data/StaticModel.eccles include/StaticModel.h .models_hash data/log.txt eccles/tools/bin
# once, to stop tracking anything already committed that matches these new rules.
